seo.title: Custom Format: Reproduce Your Exact Meeting Minutes with AI | Minutes.AI
seo.description: Minutes.AI's new Custom Format feature analyzes your existing meeting minutes — text, PDF, or photo — and replicates the exact structure automatically. A level of customization Otter.ai and Notta can't match.
seo.ogTitle: Custom Format: Your Meeting Minutes, Your Structure — Powered by AI
seo.ogDescription: Upload your existing minutes template and let AI replicate the exact structure for every future meeting. A game-changing feature unavailable on Otter.ai or Notta.

ld.headline: Custom Format: Reproduce Your Exact Meeting Minutes with AI
ld.description: Introducing Minutes.AI's Custom Format feature that analyzes your organization's meeting minutes and replicates the structure automatically.

hero.h1: Custom Format: Your Familiar Minutes, Now Powered by AI
hero.tagline: Every organization has its own meeting minutes style. Until now, AI note-takers forced you into their templates. With Custom Format, you simply upload your existing minutes — as text, PDF, or even a photo — and Minutes.AI learns your structure, replicating it perfectly for every future meeting.
hero.subtag: No more compromising on format. Your minutes, your rules — with the power of AI doing the heavy lifting.

problem.h2: AI Minutes That Don't Look Like Yours
problem.p1: AI meeting note tools like Otter.ai and Notta generate decent summaries — but they come in the tool's format, not yours. If your company has a specific minutes template with designated sections, headers, and action-item layouts, you're stuck reformatting every single time.
problem.p2: Some tools offer 'custom prompts' where you type instructions and hope the AI interprets them correctly. But the results are hit-or-miss — no better than asking ChatGPT or Google Gemini to format your notes. The fundamental problem remains: the AI doesn't actually understand your document's structure.
problem.quote: "Our team has a specific minutes format. Every AI tool I've tried ignores it completely."

solution.h2: Just Show the AI What You Want
solution.p1: **Custom Format** takes a radically different approach. Instead of describing your format in words, you simply **show** it to the AI.
solution.p2: Upload a sample of your existing meeting minutes — whether it's a text document, a PDF, or even a photo of a printed page — and Minutes.AI's engine will analyze the structure, section hierarchy, tone, and layout. From that point on, every meeting you record will be formatted exactly the way your organization expects.
highlights: **Text Upload**: Paste or upload your minutes as plain text — the AI extracts the structural pattern instantly.
**PDF Analysis**: Upload a formatted PDF and the AI preserves headers, sections, bullet styles, and hierarchy.
**Photo Recognition**: Snap a photo of a printed or handwritten minutes template — the AI reads and replicates the structure.
**One-Time Setup**: Upload once, and the format is saved. Every future meeting follows your template automatically.
**Structural Understanding**: Unlike simple prompts, Custom Format truly understands document architecture — not just keywords.

items.title: Beyond 'Custom Prompts'
items.desc: Other services let you type instructions like 'format as a formal meeting note.' The results are unpredictable. Custom Format doesn't guess — it analyzes a real document and replicates the exact structure.

items.title: Built for Organizations
items.desc: Whether it's a corporate board meeting template, an engineering standup format, or a sales call report — Custom Format adapts to your organization's specific needs.

items.title: The 'Itchy Spot' Finally Scratched
items.desc: This is the feature that no competitor — not Otter.ai, not Notta, not any AI transcription service — offers. True structural replication from your own documents.

pricing.p1: Custom Format is available across all Minutes.AI plans. Choose the plan that fits your workflow.

free.text: Try it free for 3 minutes every day — no credit card required.

bullets: **Time Packs**: Great for occasional use — minutes never expire.
**Subscriptions**: Unlimited recording and formatting for power users.
**100+ Languages**: Record and format minutes in over 100 languages.

cta.text: Upload your existing minutes template, record your next meeting, and see the magic happen. Your AI-generated minutes will finally look like yours.
